Load a competition canvas from a .scscanvas file

load_competition_canvas.Rd

Reads a file written by save_competition_canvas (or its Python equivalent) and returns an htmlwidget that can be displayed in the RStudio Viewer, Shiny, or R Markdown, or saved to a standalone HTML file with htmlwidgets::saveWidget().

Usage

load_competition_canvas(path, width = NULL, height = NULL)

Arguments

path

Path to a .scscanvas JSON file.

width, height

Widget dimensions in pixels. NULL uses the values stored in the file (or package defaults when those are also NULL).

Value

An htmlwidget of class competition_canvas.
